title: Mineshafts Begone
description: A data pack that removes mineshafts from world generation.
body:
![An X over a PNG of a Mineshaft](https://i.imgur.com/grimn5Y.png)

Mineshafts Begone

a data pack that removes mineshafts

***  

This datapack removes vanilla mineshafts that generate in both mesa and non-mesa biomes. Helpful for when mineshaft generation occurs in void bottom worlds.
